source_report: docs/下一阶段全面审计待办与执行方案.md
principle: Next-stage tasks are based on real regression-audit debt, not vague expansion requests. Execute P0 before P1/P2.

tasks.goal: Raise AI provider diagnosability and keep AI companion useful under provider failure.
acceptance: Provider diagnostics separate local request-shape risk from account/model/service risk.
Partner simulation returns expression_chain, related_resources, and mistake_memory on provider failure.
AI success contract reports structured success, recoverable success, raw text gaps, and fallback reasons without payload leakage.
steps: Snapshot ai_provider_diagnostics, ai_failure_analysis, and ai_provider_success_contract.
Extend compatibility matrix for authorization, region, endpoint, mode, payload shape, response shape, and rate limit.
Harden probe readiness and live-probe policy boundaries without leaking secrets or prompt text.
Improve partner fallback quality with expression chains, resources, mistake memory, and next practice.
Add regression tests for HTTP 400, response-shape aliases, and fallback payload completeness.
verification: .venv/bin/python -m ruff check backend/ai/provider_client.py backend/api/analytics.py backend/api/training.py tests/test_ai_provider_safety.py tests/test_analytics_api.py tests/test_training_flow.py

implemented: Provider diagnostics now classifies HTTP 401/403 auth/permission, 404 endpoint/model, 429 quota, and 5xx provider-side failures.
Failure playbook exposes new non-secret quality gates and regression case ids for those statuses.
Partner provider-failure fallback test now asserts expression_chain, related_resources, and mistake_memory stay populated.
validation: 56 targeted tests passed for ai_provider_safety, analytics_api, and training_flow.
ruff passed for touched AI analytics/training files and tests.
mypy strict passed for deepseek_client, analytics, and training.
regression-audit passed and now reports http_403 auth_or_model_permission in provider diagnostics.
frontend type-check and build passed.

tasks.goal: Raise import quality from 75 toward 85 by governing 88 active historical issues.
acceptance: Active issues are grouped into batch-closable, source-review-required, and recrawl-required classes.
Issue closure writes reviewer, resolution hash, and audit logs without storing resolution prose or third-party full text.
Import quality report shows a clear score improvement path and keeps auto_repairable_fields at zero.
steps: Rank active issue source groups by severity and count.
Dry-run warning-only batch closures where evidence is sufficient.
Send error-level groups to request_review rather than auto close.
Expose weekly source-group priorities and projected score lift in Governance.
Record audit history and regression-audit detail.
verification: .venv/bin/python -m ruff check backend/api/evolution.py backend/database/schema_guard.py tools/commander.py tests/test_learning_pipeline_api.py tests/test_commander.py
cd frontend && npm run type-check && npm run build && npm run smoke:world

implemented: Import quality report now exposes issue_triage with batch_closable, source_review_required, and manual_reimport_required buckets.
Issue queue now returns the same triage summary alongside source groups, without auto-closing historical issues.
Triage reports current score, projected score after reviewer-approved batch closures, quality gates, source counts, issue counts, and next actions.
validation: 20 learning pipeline tests passed, including triage separation coverage.
23 database schema guard and commander tests passed.
ruff passed for touched evolution/governance files and tests.
regression-audit passed and still surfaces import quality debt instead of hiding it.
frontend type-check, build, and world smoke passed with checked=61.

tasks.goal: Create publish-ready boutique training resources without lowering specificity gates.
acceptance: At least one resource batch has publish_ready > 0.
Low-specificity resources remain blocked even when metadata is complete.
Default Resources list excludes pytest, quarantine, and generic low-quality content.
steps: Extract blocking reasons from reviewed publish candidates.
Generate curation briefs for blocked resources and knowledge entries.
Create project-original replacement cards with concrete scene, partner words, bad response, better response, emotion signal, boundary, drill, and expression tools.
Use reviewed asset governance actions for reviewed/published transitions.
Prioritize published and high-quality cards in Resources and ResourceDetail.
verification: .venv/bin/python -m ruff check backend/api/evolution.py backend/api/resources.py tests/test_catalog_profile_review_api.py tests/test_vector_index.py
cd frontend && npm run type-check && npm run build && npm run smoke:world

implemented: Added reviewed-assets/boutique-batch for idempotent project-original concrete practice cards with dry-run support and audit logging.
Generated a production boutique batch across the project main axes; publish-ready reviewed candidates rose to 27.
Default resource listing now requires reviewed/published visibility and hides pytest fixture sources while preserving governance tests with non-pytest sources.
Publish-candidate scanning now looks beyond the visible limit so high-quality cards are not buried by legacy reviewed records.
validation: 19 catalog/profile/review and vector tests passed.
ruff passed for evolution/resources and touched tests.
regression-audit passed with reviewed_publish_candidates.publish_ready=27 and import auto_repairable_fields=0 after safe repair.
frontend type-check, build, and world smoke passed with checked=61.

tasks.goal: Reduce perceived repetition and improve resource-card learning value.
acceptance: First page has no continuous template-like duplicates.
Similarity governance quarantines or rewrites variants without deletion.
Quality report exposes duplicate debt, mission alignment, specificity, and practice completeness.
steps: Cluster resources by title family, scenario, expression tool, practice task, fingerprint, and vector similarity.
Keep the most concrete card per cluster visible and queue variants for quarantine or rewrite.
Generate project-original replacements only; never present third-party summaries as original full text.
Shuffle default listing by semantic family to avoid repeated cards.
Add detail reasons explaining why each card is worth practicing.

implemented: Resource quality report now exposes perceived_duplicate_debt and practice_completeness metrics.
Similarity queue now scans only visible reviewed/published resources, aligning governance with user-facing resource browsing.
Default resource list already breaks first-page continuous family runs; report now quantifies that risk explicitly.
Regression tests cover duplicate family reporting, practice marker scoring, and excluding draft/quarantine similarity noise.
validation: 21 vector/catalog tests passed.
ruff passed for vector/resource quality/resources and touched tests.
resource_quality_report on real data surfaced 933 duplicate families, largest family size 36, first-page max continuous run 1, and 7939 thin cards.
regression-audit passed; safe repair returned auto_repairable_fields to 0 after test data creation.
frontend world smoke passed with checked=61.

tasks.goal: Unify long-list browsing across multi-record pages.
acceptance: Multi-record pages use sticky collapsible right-side TOC or a documented equivalent.
Search inputs provide API/database suggestions and still allow manual entry.
Desktop has no wasted collapsed-sidebar column; mobile has no horizontal overflow.
steps: Audit Resources, ResourceSurf, Expression, Knowledge, Mistakes, Audit, Governance, Analytics, and Path.
Apply PageTocSidebar consistently and reclaim layout width on collapse.
Add suggestion datalists or grouped chips to long-list search fields.
Prefer inline expansion for card details and detail pages for full reading.
Extend world-class smoke coverage for affected pages.
verification: cd frontend && npm run type-check && npm run build && npm run smoke:world

implemented: Resources, ResourceSurf, ResourceDetail, and Expression use the shared PageTocSidebar with sticky/collapsible right-side behavior.
Collapsed TOC controls dock to the right edge and release the 280px sidebar column on resource/source/detail pages.
Resource and expression search fields expose database-backed/native datalist suggestions while preserving manual input.
Expression details use inline expansion and tool-chain recommendations are no longer occupying the TOC sidebar.
validation: frontend type-check passed.
frontend build passed.
frontend world smoke passed with checked=61, including TocCollapseLayout, ExpressionSearchSuggestions, ResourceLearningScaffold, and PathLearningScaffold coverage.
39 backend expression/training/learning tests passed while rechecking expression and path learning contracts.

tasks.goal: Turn expression tools from vocabulary cards into micro-courses.
acceptance: Each tool explains definition, why it works, how to use it, when not to use it, examples, and drills.
Mistake rewrite can attribute tool misuse and generate three rewrites.
Trainer scoring points to specific expression tools.
steps: Backfill tool detail fields for principles, cases, misuses, boundaries, and drills.
Create scene-specific tool chains for initial contact, flirt, conflict, repair, long-term, and public settings.
Expose richer details in Expression, Trainer, TrainerAI, and Mistakes.

implemented: Expression cards expose definition, principles, formula, practice method, scenarios, risk boundaries, before/after examples, and transfer drills.
Trainer scoring and TrainerAI reference expression tools, risk boundaries, and tool-chain rationale.
Mistake/resource flows preserve expression context through training and rewrite entry points.
validation: tests/test_expression_api.py and tests/test_training_flow.py passed as part of the 39-test expression/training/learning run.
world smoke passed ExpressionSearchSuggestions and expanded card detail checks.

tasks.goal: Upgrade Path from overview into evidence-based curriculum.
acceptance: Every stage has goals, concepts, pitfalls, observable signals, drills, and promotion evidence.
Stage recommendations connect to resources, expression tools, mistakes, and Trainer.
Promotion evidence comes from training records rather than static copy.
steps: Extend curriculum graph payload with stage-level learning scaffolds.
Add current-stage diagnosis and recommended resources.
Render stage concept/principle/method/scenario/pitfall/examples/drill in Path.
Add smoke coverage for stage details.
verification: cd frontend && npm run type-check && npm run build && npm run smoke:world

implemented: Path page renders route principles and stage-level concepts, methods, scenarios, pitfalls, low-quality/better examples, and drills.
Curriculum graph exposes evidence and promotion scaffolds through the learning API.
validation: tests/test_learning_pipeline_api.py and tests/test_training_flow.py passed.
frontend type-check/build/world smoke passed, including PathLearningScaffold.

tasks.goal: Keep profile and settings fully evidence-bound and user-understandable.
acceptance: Profile metrics show source, formula, and updated time.
Settings export remains real Markdown with location guidance and checksum.
Reminder copy states browser-notification limitations clearly.
steps: Add metric evidence rows for profile stats.
Add learning evidence timeline where data exists.
Verify export and reminder UI are not decorative or over-promising.
verification: cd frontend && npm run type-check && npm run build && npm run smoke:world

implemented: Profile metrics show evidence sources and avoid unverifiable hard-coded lifetime stats.
Settings export produces readable Markdown with checksum and explicit save-location guidance.
Daily reminder is implemented as browser-local notification with clear limitations and test reminder.
validation: frontend type-check/build/world smoke passed, including ProfileEvidence, SettingsExport, and SettingsReminder.

tasks.goal: Raise vector recall above operational minimum for recommendations and dedupe.
acceptance: Evaluation probes cover resources, knowledge, samples, expression tools, and mistake context.
Recall, MRR, threshold hit rates, and weak spots are reported by type.
Top10 recall target is at least 0.7.
steps: Expand vector evaluation probe set.
Separate thresholds for near-duplicate, recommendation, and exploration.
Report false-positive/false-negative examples without raw private text.
Queue metadata backfill for weak types.

implemented: Vector evaluation reports backend, probes, threshold hit rates, by-type recall, weak spots, MRR, and top-k recall.
Similarity governance and recommendation search use metadata-only local vectors with sqlite-vec readiness.
validation: tests/test_vector_index.py passed.
mypy strict passed for backend/core/vector_index.py.
regression-audit passed with vector_recall.top10_recall=0.75.

tasks.goal: Make relationship-state movement visible in Trainer, TrainerAI, and Mistakes.
acceptance: Compare reports include emotion-path diff and state-shift explanation.
TrainerAI explains trust, pressure, boundary safety, and connection changes per turn.
Mistakes classify where the relationship movement broke.
steps: Extend compare output with before/after state movement.
Render state-shift reasons in Trainer and TrainerAI.
Add mistake categories based on emotional-flow breakpoints.
Keep safety-blocked paths educational and non-controlling.

implemented: Compare reports include emotion_path and structured relationship-state signals.
TrainerAI displays trust, stress, boundary, connection, state_shift, expression chain, and risk_boundary per response.
Mistake attribution includes boundary pressure and emotional-flow repair categories.
validation: tests/test_training_flow.py passed in the expression/training/learning test run.
world smoke passed TrainerAI and resource-to-training flows.

tasks.goal: Give ResourceSurf real link health and source reliability signals.
acceptance: Sources store status, HTTP code, redirect, and last_checked_at.
Invalid links are downgraded or hidden by default.
Source titles remain clickable outbound links.
steps: Add conservative link-health checker for registered sources.
Store health metadata without scraping full text.
Expose filters by health, language, and source type in ResourceSurf.
Add scheduled health check plan.

implemented: Added /api/resources/sources/health-check with dry-run and real metadata-only checks using HEAD plus GET fallback.
Source health is stored in pipeline_run_logs with status, HTTP code, redirect URL, redirected flag, last_checked_at, and no page body.
Invalid source URLs downgrade reviewed/published resources to draft so default Resources browsing hides them.
ResourceSurf source cards now show real health, HTTP code, redirect, and last checked metadata while keeping titles clickable outbound links.
validation: tests/test_catalog_profile_review_api.py covered link metadata storage, invalid-link downgrade, and source-card health response.
frontend type-check, build, and world smoke passed.

tasks.goal: Make content batches auditable, reversible, and visible.
acceptance: Generated/imported batches record batch_id, rule version, prompt version, and quality summary.
Governance supports dry-run rollback by batch without deleting rows.
Analytics shows duplicate rate, publish rate, quarantine count, and issue closure trend.
steps: Define batch audit payload shape.
Add batch list and rollback dry-run endpoint.
Add Governance batch action panel.
Add Analytics resource-quality trend panel.
verification: cd frontend && npm run type-check && npm run build && npm run smoke:world

implemented: Added /api/evolution/import-batches/rollback-plan for non-destructive batch rollback dry-run planning.

Rollback plans expose affected issues, knowledge entries, resources, related logs, planned status transitions, rule version, prompt version, duplicate rate, publish rate, quarantine count, and open issue count.
The endpoint never deletes rows and marks the audit payload as dry_run_only/content_deleted=false.
validation: tests/test_learning_pipeline_api.py covered rollback impact, planned transitions, quality summary, audit payload, and non-destructive behavior.
regression-audit passed after the change.

tasks.goal: Keep flirt, humor, and adult-adjacent content inside consent and boundary constraints.
acceptance: Manipulation, coercion, stalking, and consent-violation prompts are hard-blocked.
Blocked paths still return respectful alternative practice.
Resource publish gates require boundary/consent evidence for high-tension content.
steps: Expand red-team examples and safety flags.
Add alternative expression drills for each blocked class.
Include boundary/consent checks in resource curation and publish gating.

implemented: SafetyGuardian now flags explicit consent-violation prompts such as bypassing refusal, forced agreement, covert recording, phone checking, and location tracking.
Blocked consent/boundary paths return respectful alternatives rather than provider calls.
Reviewed resource publish gates now block high-tension/flirty/adult-adjacent resources unless they include explicit boundary, consent, comfort, stop, or refusal-exit evidence.
validation: tests/test_ai_provider_safety.py covered consent-violation hard block and alternatives.
tests/test_catalog_profile_review_api.py covered high-tension publish blocking and safe boundary-evidence pass.
regression-audit passed.
